## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8bf5c8993e97e4a8a3f91ab4b6b7618dc0f73864793854b4458516ece843a6db)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'actions-runner-admin' @ 99.99.99 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
